commentary_links.hebrew: וְכׇל־בֶּ֧גֶד וְכׇל־כְּלִי־ע֛וֹר וְכׇל־מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה עִזִּ֖ים וְכׇל־כְּלִי־עֵ֑ץ תִּתְחַטָּֽאוּ׃ {ס}
commentary_links.english: You shall also cleanse every cloth, every article of skin, everything made of goats’ hair, and every object of wood.”
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מה תלמוד לומר וכל מעשה עזים תתחטאו
